posts.value_post:
Most Airbnb hosts are running a hospitality business with zero systems.

Guest messages scattered across apps. Cleaning schedules in their head. Revenue tracked in a spreadsheet they haven't opened since January.

You can't scale what you can't see.

Organize every listing. Every guest. Every dollar. Then grow.

thread_post: I built a Notion template for Airbnb hosts who are tired of managing everything in their head. Here's what's inside:

The Listing Dashboard

One page shows everything:
- Active listings & occupancy rates
- This month's revenue
- Upcoming check-ins
- Today's cleanings
- Low stock alerts
- Open maintenance issues

No more switching between 6 different apps.

Guest Communication Templates

6 ready-to-send messages for every stage:
- Booking confirmation
- Check-in instructions
- Welcome message
- Mid-stay check-in
- Checkout reminder
- Review request

Copy, personalize, send. 30 seconds per guest instead of 15 minutes.

Revenue Tracking (the part most hosts ignore)

Every dollar tracked per property:
- Booking payouts
- Cleaning costs
- Maintenance expenses
- Platform fees
- Supplies

Monthly P&L auto-calculated. Know exactly which listing makes money and which one is bleeding cash.

7 databases. 22 views. All connected.

Works on free Notion. $17.

Link in bio
